title: Investment ratios
summary: 9609 A Level — dividend yield, cover, P/E, and shareholder returns.
learningObjectives: Calculate dividend per share and yield.

simpleExplanation.title: Shareholder perspective
simpleExplanation.summary: Investment ratios help shareholders judge returns and market valuation relative to earnings and dividends.
steps: High P/E may mean growth expectations.

sections.content: **Investment ratios** (10.2.5) complete **10.2**. Use **case share price data** when given.
